'''Tritos Nal''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the old [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]].

==Biography==
Nal was a master of [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] and proficient in the art of [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]]. He based the majority of his work in his workshop on [[Korriz]]. Tritos was a loyal friend of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Lord [[Garu]], and he used his skills to craft a powerful [[Sith sword]] for him.
